description: Held-out single-module surface variant of the session macro family with renamed tokens but the same coherent structure.
natural_language_spec: OPEN_BATCH_1 begins the macro, STEP_1 performs the coherent middle action, and CLOSE_BATCH_1 ends it. The reusable macro is still absent from source code.

formal_spec.safety_property: The renamed held-out module must preserve the same coherent ordering.

logs.message: Held-out renamed macro closed before the middle action completed
